lessons.title: Exact standard output
lessons.body: Build one line from stdin data and choose print or println deliberately; the judge normalizes CRLF to LF, while every other whitespace difference remains significant.

lessons.title: UTF-8 standard input
lessons.body: Read every stdin byte, decode with UTF-8 explicitly, split only when text is nonblank, and total any number of signed integer tokens.

lessons.title: Typed values and final bindings
lessons.body: Parse a String and two ints, derive a boolean with a typed comparison, and remember that final blocks reassignment rather than mutation inside an object.

lessons.title: Truncating integer arithmetic
lessons.body: Compute quotient and remainder with Java int operators; division truncates toward zero, and the remainder keeps the dividend's sign.

lessons.title: String cleanup and content equality
lessons.body: Strip surrounding Unicode whitespace, remove a matching ASCII bracket pair, and treat String length and indices as UTF-16 code units.

lessons.title: Branches and bounded loops
lessons.body: Walk from one through an inclusive limit and add only odd values, using a boolean condition because Java integers are not truth values.

lessons.title: Exhaustive enum switch expressions
lessons.body: Represent three fixed states with an enum and map each constant through an arrow-style switch expression without fall-through.

lessons.title: Typed static method checkpoint
lessons.body: Put an integer area calculation behind a typed static method, parse its arguments in main, and call the method rather than duplicating its expression.

lessons.title: Overloads and varargs arrays
lessons.body: Let a varargs overload total an int array, then delegate to the fixed-arity overload that formats a name and one computed total.

lessons.title: Imports and fully qualified names
lessons.body: Use an imported ArrayList implementation through a fully qualified java.util.List type; imports shorten source names but do not load dependencies.

lessons.title: Collection observations
lessons.body: Parse an int array, copy values into a List, count them in a Map, and report the Map-derived sum, List size, and Set uniqueness.

lessons.title: Generic element preservation
lessons.body: Write a last-element helper whose type parameter connects the List element type to the return type without raw collections or casts.

lessons.title: Lazy stream pipelines
lessons.body: Filter even integers, square them with IntStream.map, and trigger the lazy pipeline with one sum terminal operation.

lessons.title: Comparator chains
lessons.body: Order users by descending score and then ascending name, avoiding subtraction comparators that can overflow.

lessons.title: Per-instance object state
lessons.body: Create a Counter object from parsed state, send it a delta through a method, and observe the field owned by that instance.

lessons.title: Constructor-established invariants
lessons.body: Initialize both final dimensions in a no-return-type constructor and use this to distinguish fields from same-named parameters.

lessons.title: Private state with enforced rules
lessons.body: Keep balance private and expose a deposit method that accepts positive changes only; access control alone does not enforce an invariant.

lessons.title: Class-owned static constants
lessons.body: Apply one static final scaling factor shared by every call, while separating class ownership from the deeper mutability of referenced objects.

lessons.title: Behavior through an interface
lessons.body: Pass an implementation through a Named interface and call its public contract without depending on the concrete User type.

lessons.title: Inheritance plus composition
lessons.body: Reuse substitutable base state through inheritance and model an independent bonus with a composed helper object.

lessons.title: Narrow exception recovery
lessons.body: Return a parsed integer when valid and recover with the supplied fallback only from NumberFormatException, an unchecked parsing failure.

lessons.title: Optional filtering and fallback
lessons.body: Model a possibly accepted token with Optional, retain present text only when it has at most three characters, and use orElse rather than calling get on an empty container.

lessons.title: Observed try-with-resources
lessons.body: Place the received bytes in a managed stream, read from that resource inside the try block, decode as UTF-8, and normalize the observed content.

lessons.title: Equality and hash consistency
lessons.body: Compare both Point coordinates with pattern instanceof and keep hashCode consistent so HashSet can honor logical equality. Unequal points may legally collide; equal points must never produce different hashes.

lessons.title: Defensive record snapshot checkpoint
lessons.body: Store a List in a record compact constructor with List.copyOf, mutate the source afterward, and sum the stable snapshot to expose shallow immutability.

lessons.title: Runtime annotation metadata
lessons.body: Retain a method annotation at runtime, restrict its target, and retrieve its prefix through reflection before formatting normalized input.

lessons.title: Sealed shapes and pattern switch
lessons.body: Close a Shape hierarchy with permits and evaluate every record subtype using Java 21 record patterns in an exhaustive switch expression.

lessons.title: Always-active capstone checks
lessons.body: Parse User records, order them by score and name, select a fallback for empty input, and validate helpers with an explicit check that cannot be disabled.
